title: Experimental features for mizer
text: extension package mizer package (https://sizespectrum.org/mizer/) contains additional features contributed mizer community. features can improved used community. matured, frequently-used features can moved core mizer package. code working mizer feel might useful mizer users, please describe new issue issue tracker ’ll comment can included package.

title: Experimental features for mizer
text: can install development version mizerExperimental GitHub gives error saying “package called remotes” also need trying install mizerExperimental. may prompted update existing packages. one package always update mizer package, mizerExperimental package always designed work recent released version mizer.
code: remotes::install_github("sizespectrum/mizerExperimental") install.packages("remotes")

title: Plot biomass flux — plotBiomassFlux
text: function plots biomass flux species model function body size. understand meaning biomass flux one think growth fish transporting biomass small large individuals. biomass flux rate biomass transported particular size. given product growth rate \(g(w)\), body mass \(w\) density individuals \(N(w)\) size, $$J_B(w) = g(w) w N(w).$$

title: Plot biomass flux — plotBiomassFlux
text: params MizerParams object ylim numeric vector length 2 giving lower upper limits y-axis. lower limit NA, set 1e-20. upper limit NA, set maximum value biomass flux. Default c(NA, NA). total logical indicating whether add line total biomass flux. Default FALSE. ... used.

title: Plot biomass flux — plotBiomassFlux
text: generic function method objects class MizerParams.

title: Plot biomass flux — plotBiomassFlux
code: plotBiomassFlux(NS_params, ylim = c(1e7, NA), total = TRUE)

what: Plot change in biomass over time — plotBiomassRelative
title: Plot change in biomass over time — plotBiomassRelative
text: similar plot can now produced mizer's mizer::plotRelative(), works directly arrays returned mizer::getBiomass(), example plotRelative(getBiomass(sim_original), getBiomass(sim)). Note mizer::plotRelative() shows symmetric relative difference \(2(N_2 - N_1)/(N_1 + N_2)\) rather percentage change relative reference.

title: Plot change in biomass over time — plotBiomassRelative
code: plotBiomassRelative(sim, sim_original = NULL, species = NULL, ...)  plotlyBiomassRelative(sim, sim_original = NULL, species = NULL, ...)

title: Plot change in biomass over time — plotBiomassRelative
text: sim MizerSim object sim_original Another MizerSim object compare biomasses . NULL (default) biomasses compared initial biomasses sim. species species selected. Optional. default target species selected. vector species names, numeric vector species indices, logical vector indicating species whether selected (TRUE) . ... Parameters passed getBiomass()

what: Plot the size distribution of the catch — plotYieldVsSize
title: Plot the size distribution of the catch — plotYieldVsSize
text: Plots normalised number density catch species function either length weight. addition catch model, also observed catch plotted supplied via catch argument. Also superimposes plot number density individuals species.

title: Plot the size distribution of the catch — plotYieldVsSize
code: plotlyYieldVsSize(   object,   species = NULL,   gear = NULL,   catch = NULL,   x_var = c("Weight", "Length"),   ... )

title: Plot the size distribution of the catch — plotYieldVsSize
text: object object class MizerSim MizerParams. species name predator species plot mortality. gear Optional. name gear. supplied, yield gear displayed. catch Data frame holding binned observed catch data. data can binned either length bins weight bins. former case data frame columns length dl holding start size bins cm width size bins cm respectively. latter case data frame columns weight dw holding start size bins grams width size bins grams. data frame also needs columns species (name species), gear (name gear) catch (number individuals particular species caught particular gear size bin). x_var Determines whether show size distribution catch function weight ("Weight") function length ("Length"). Default "Weight". return_data boolean value determines whether formatted data used plot returned instead plot . Default value FALSE ... arguments (currently unused)

title: Plot the size distribution of the catch — plotYieldVsSize
text: ggplot2 object, unless return_data = TRUE, case list composed two slots returned. First slot data frame four variables 'w' 'l' (depending x_var), 'Catch density', 'Type', 'Species second slot data frame four variables 'w_mat', 'Species', 'y_coord', 'Type' (plot vertical lines).

title: Plot the size distribution of the catch — plotYieldVsSize
text: generic function methods objects class MizerSim MizerParams. method MizerSim object plots catch initial state simulation. interactive version available plotlyYieldVsSize().

title: mizerExperimental 3.0.0
text: Now works requires mizer 3.0.0. plotSpectra2(), plotSpectraRelative(), markBackground() removeBackgroundSpecies() moved core mizer. plotBiomassRelative() plotYieldRelative() (plotly variants) soft-deprecated favour mizer’s new plotRelative(), works directly arrays returned getBiomass() getYield(). Functions acting MizerParams MizerSim object converted S3 methods

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.4
text: tuneParams() tuneGrowth() now moved mizerEcopath package plotEnergyBudget() now calculates ERepro correctly uses line plot instead area plot. matchYield() now species gears arguments update selected catchabilities.

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.3
text: Now works expects mizer 2.5.3

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.3
text: Fixed bug caused tuneParams() crash species associated gear. Fixed sliders control double_sigmoid_length gears Slider n m exponents now update intended. Gear selectivity sliders now always active expected. Avoid crash double-clicking catch tab. Update intake_max changing h. Make sure species sliders get updated values change “steady”.

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.3
text: Fixed bug plotYieldVsF() caused crash F_max specified (#61) thanks @SamikDatta plotSpectra2() now shows models expected order (#63) thanks @cmbeese plotYieldVsSize() now works single species single gear.

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.3
text: tuneParams() longer restricted single gear per species. tuneParams() can now keep yield matched observations. Allow smaller effort values fishingControl shallower maturity curves reproductionControl Allow otherControl() change external mortality even protected. Allow m parameter decreased well increased Changed mortality slider control external mortality maturity size.

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.3
text: New plotting function plotBiomassFlux(), plots rate growth transports biomass size axis. getYieldVsF() now also works species targeted multiple gears. Introduced F_min argument getYieldVsF() plotYieldVsF() allow user set minimum fishing mortality rate plot. plotYieldVsF() set sensible default F_max. tuneYield() can now keep biomass numbers constant.

title: mizerExperimental 2.5.3
text: plotDiet() validSim() singleSpeciesSteady() become steadySingleSpecies()

title: mizerExperimental 2.4.0
text: plotBiomassRelative() plotYieldRelative() plotSpectraRelative() plotSpectra2()

title: mizerExperimental 2.3.1
text: plotDeath() plotEnergyBudget() plotResourceLevel() plotResourcePred() plotYieldVsSize() Also plotYieldVsF() improved.

title: mizerExperimental 2.3.1
text: singleSpeciesSteady() alignResource()

title: mizerExperimental 2.3.1
text: Allow tabs set title, see issue #37 resourceControl() now works also resource dynamics constant. Reproduction plot now calculates reproduction success correctly also non-zero reproduction level. Clean-spectraTab code. Now button trigger already displayed pressed. Call setBevertonHolt() focus species. feature whereby one can call tuneParams() without parameter recover log files crash now working . catch tab now functionality calibration matching biomass tab. changing predation kernel parameters, search volume also rescaled keep encounter rate larvae. Now one can also match abundances observed numbers instead observed biomasses. Extracted plotting code plot functions. Corrected plotting observed catch. Corrected y-axis scale density plots. title: mizerExperimental 2.3.0
text: Important change: updated species abundance now always calculated unchanged background. Using params instead p argument name. Many help popups. Main panel utilises available space. Add buttons keyboard shortcuts cycling species. Move tabs controls individual files add roxygen comments. New match argument determines whether biomasses yields neither matched press steady button. Remove ability upload params objects. New growthControl controls. New biomassTab tab. Controls can now also update species sliders. default preserves erepro. Scaling background now happens clicking slider without need ‘Go’ button. Double-clicking growth curve plot now toggles panel view individual species view. overrride ggplot2 theme, just adjust font size. Rename cutoff_size biomass_cutoff everywhere. Many changes.
